name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.16.0 - FOUNDATION INVARIANT HARNESSES. Adds three wired harnesses turning prose-only invariants into auto-firing gates: (1) TEMPORAL-GROUNDING — OS-grounded datetime injected into every UserPromptSubmit; no more 'tonight' said at Monday afternoon. (2) CODIFY-OR-MARK-UNCODIFIED scan auto-fire on PreToolUse(Edit/Write/MultiEdit) of .md files in invariant-carrier locations (cyborg/, plugins/, CLAUDE.md, references/invariants/); surfaces prose-only invariants as WARNING before edits land. (3) UNIT-OF-WORK-COMMIT — Stop hook checks workspace cwd for uncommitted changes (gated by workspace-identity), surfaces reminder per CLAUDE.md protocol. Carries forward v4.15 skill-version-banner + v4.14 survival layer.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
